questions.q: U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order on April 30, 2026, authorizing which cross-border crude pipeline segment from Canada into Wyoming?

options: A list of voters and their addresses
questions.correctText: A list of voters and their addresses

questions.q: Ottawa recently announced that a first-of-its-kind multinational defence bank, designed to lower the cost of financing major military purchases for NATO partners, will be headquartered in which country?
U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer told Canadians at a Washington roundtable that what phrase is considered strict administration policy, not just a slogan?
